极速快3导师.【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239182919_65419559<br>vk.com/topic-239183551_66292582<br>vk.com/topic-239199061_66292583<br>vk.com/topic-239251659_65419560<br>vk.com/topic-239182931_66292584<br>vk.com/topic-239226431_66292585<br>vk.com/topic-239218437_66069365<br>vk.com/topic-239243972_65240929<br>vk.com/topic-239218359_65419565<br>vk.com/topic-239149368_65141083<br>vk.com/topic-239182914_64627082<br>vk.com/topic-239218483_64799185<br>vk.com/topic-239183221_66292588<br>vk.com/topic-239251643_64799186<br>vk.com/topic-239182912_65240932<br>vk.com/topic-239183362_65240933<br>vk.com/topic-239153658_65141085<br>vk.com/topic-239251558_65141036<br>vk.com/topic-239183490_65694136<br>vk.com/topic-239251687_66069370<br>vk.com/topic-239251645_64542337<br>vk.com/topic-239251616_64949520<br>vk.com/topic-239218339_65419570<br>vk.com/topic-239183492_65240939<br>vk.com/topic-239183347_66069375<br>vk.com/topic-239199892_65240937<br>vk.com/topic-239183251_66292593<br>vk.com/topic-239149336_64949522<br>vk.com/topic-239183250_65694138<br>vk.com/topic-239241833_64799192<br>vk.com/topic-239183468_65141094<br>vk.com/topic-239183408_65141093<br>vk.com/topic-239251642_65240938<br>vk.com/topic
